headline: South Florida's tech scene is heating up with quantum investments, women in innovation moments & eVTOL launches taking flight—lowkey it's the best week to be tracking Miami startups fr

stories.title: Florida Gets Its First Quantum Computing Investment & Tech Hub Expansion
stories.summary: Palm Beach State College nabbed $4.9M from the state for quantum tech workforce development—it's fr the biggest single funding grab showing how serious Florida is about leading the next computing revolution. Meanwhile, Israel Tech Week Miami is accepting applications through March 15 for startups to pitch globally.
stories.takeaway: Quantum infrastructure + talent pipeline = Florida's playing for keeps in next-gen computing

stories.title: South Florida Tech Hub Women in Innovation Panel Drops Major Leadership Insights
stories.summary: Highkey inspiring conversation happened March 5 at South Florida Tech Hub Pulse 2026 where women leaders shared how they built orgs, earned influence & scaled teams. Meggie Soliman moderated discussions on navigating risk & strategic partnerships.
stories.takeaway: Women are literally reshaping the South Florida innovation landscape & sharing the playbook

stories.title: Miami's eVTOL Revolution Gets Federal Green Light—Air Taxis Are Real Now
stories.summary: Florida's in the White House's eVTOL Integration Pilot Program with Archer Aviation + Wisk Aero both locking in Miami for electric air taxi service. We're talking infrastructure at Hard Rock Stadium & Magic City Innovation District—this isn't sci-fi anymore.
stories.takeaway: South Florida's positioning itself as the capital of urban air mobility, like tomorrow's infrastructure is launching today

stories.title: MDC Launches $1M Startup Internship Program to Plug Miami's Talent Gap
stories.summary: Miami Dade College + Blackstone LaunchPad just kicked off paid internships at local startups with $1M backing—students get real experience + professional development workshops before they even graduate. Lowkey genius way to build workforce pipeline.
stories.takeaway: Miami's finally connecting students directly to startup jobs while building next generation of founders

watchNext.title: NationGraph Expands Miami Presence with $18M Series A in Gov Tech
watchNext.why: Canadian AI startup securing government procurement contracts just added Miami to their SF & Toronto offices—shows capital flowing to South Florida for serious B2B tech plays

watchNext.title: USF Engineering Wins Semiconductor Workforce Award—Florida's Chip Strategy Heating Up
watchNext.why: Major recognition fr Florida Semiconductor Institute for USF's microelectronics training program signals state's doubling down on semiconductor talent pipeline & research—directly impacts South Florida's deeptech ecosystem
